pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from commons-lang3 to let Spring Boot BOM manage it.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 manages commons-lang3 version; keeping an old explicit version (3.5) may cause conflicts or security issues, though not strictly a compile error, it's a migration best practice.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from rest-assured to let Spring Boot BOM manage it.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 manages rest-assured version; keeping an old explicit version (3.0.3) may cause conflicts with managed dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add hamcrest-junit dependency for test assertions.
pom.xml.why_exists: This is a new test dependency addition, likely to replace or supplement existing assertion libraries; not strictly required for compilation but part of the migration recipe.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from the constructor to adopt Spring Boot's implicit single-constructor injection.
Remove unused import for the @Autowired annotation.
Update acceptsProfiles call to use the new Profiles.of() factory method introduced in Spring Framework 6.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: The varargs overload of acceptsProfiles(String...) is deprecated in Spring Framework 6 and may be removed in future versions; using Profiles.of() is the required modern API.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Add import for the new Profiles class used in the updated API call.
Update imports to use specific @GetMapping instead of generic @RequestMapping and RequestMethod.
Replace verbose @RequestMapping with specific @GetMapping annotation for cleaner code.
Update imports to use the new specific annotation and remove unused generic ones.

src/main/resources/application-dev.prope.general_idea: Comment out the deprecated 'endpoints.actuator.sensitive' property to align with Spring Boot 3.x Actuator changes.
Comment out the deprecated 'management.security.enabled' property to align with Spring Boot 3.x security auto-configuration changes.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 static assertion import with Hamcrest static assertion import.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: org.junit.Assert is part of JUnit 4 which is no longer the default test engine; while not strictly a compile error if JUnit 4 is on classpath, it is a migration step to remove JUnit 4 dependency usage in favor of JUnit 5/Hamcrest standard.
The import is no longer needed after removing the @RunWith annotation, preventing unused import warnings or errors.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Update static import for assertThat to use Hamcrest directly instead of JUnit 4 wrapper.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: While not strictly a compilation error, using the JUnit 4 static import is deprecated in favor of direct Hamcrest imports in modern testing setups.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Update assertThat import to use Hamcrest's MatcherAssert instead of JUnit 4's Assert.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.why_exists: While JUnit 5 still supports Hamcrest, the static import from org.junit.Assert is often removed or discouraged in favor of direct Hamcrest imports to decouple from JUnit 4 artifacts.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/springboot.general_idea: Add explicit Mockito strictness settings for better test reliability.
Add @MockitoSettings to configure strictness for Mockito in JUnit 5 context.
Fix indentation in test assertions to use spaces instead of mixed tabs/spaces.
